items.title: Super slow download speeds
items.summary:
Game taking forever to download even though the install size isn’t big 

Bigger games download faster so something strange is going on

Edit: Ok the game downloaded and I played it for a bit

The Good

Music is really good 

Art is tasteful and pleasing to the eye without overt ridiculous fan service that makes you want to roll your eyes

Combat is fairly complex and interesting

The Bad

The dialogue is very confusing and I have very clue as to what is going on, the AI translation doesn’t work very well for this and it shows

Also the game seems to have some kind of lag perhaps the servers are just too far from my location, but it’s very uncertain whether your actions have been registered because it takes too long for it to take effect so you end up clicking things a bunch of times. Thankfully this game is turned based or it would be a huge problem

Further edit: Ok the game has grown on me and I have to say that despite the AI translation issues the story is very interesting and emotional

The gameplay is ridiculously good and it’s fun using the different realms, and the music is just orgasmic

Just please add more male characters and I will be happy 

There is something very good here
items.author: MelchiorTime
